title: Regional benches of Supreme Court: A constitutional necessity deferred by institutional anxiety
description: For decades, Article 130 of the Constitution has remained unused. That silence is now being questioned. In a move that could redefine how the nation accesses its highest court, a Constitution (Amendment) Bill, 2026 has been introduced to operationalise a provision that has existed more on paper than in practice.Introduced by Rajya Sabha MP P Wilson, the private member Bill goes beyond geography; it raises deeper questions about federalism, accessibility and the concentration of judicial power. T
